description: Create Helm charts under infra/helm/ with an umbrella chart (quant-platform) and per-service templates including Deployment, Service, HPA, PDB, NetworkPolicy, and ServiceMonitor. Values files for staging and production.
steps: Create infra/helm/quant-platform/Chart.yaml - umbrella chart with dependencies for each sub-service.
Create infra/helm/quant-platform/values.yaml - default values for all services.
Create infra/helm/quant-platform/values-staging.yaml - staging overrides (fewer replicas, smaller resources).
Create infra/helm/quant-platform/values-production.yaml - production values (HA, larger resources, strict policies).
Create infra/helm/quant-platform/templates/_helpers.tpl - common template helpers (name, labels, selectors).
Create infra/helm/quant-platform/templates/identity-deployment.yaml - identity service Deployment with probes, env, resources.

Repeat the template pattern for all other services (chat-api, mail-api, ai-api, sync-api, ads-api, tube-api, neon-api, edits-api, max-api, ws-gateway) - use a parameterized approach in values to avoid excessive duplication.
Create infra/helm/quant-platform/templates/ingress.yaml - NGINX ingress with path-based routing to all services.
Create infra/helm/quant-platform/templates/configmap.yaml - shared ConfigMap for common env vars.
acceptance_criteria: Chart.yaml exists with proper apiVersion v2 and metadata
All template files use proper Go template syntax ({{ .Values.x }}, {{ include }}, etc.)
Each service has Deployment, Service, HPA, PDB, NetworkPolicy, ServiceMonitor templates
Values files define resources, replicas, image tags for all services
Production values have higher replicas and resource limits than staging
NetworkPolicy restricts traffic to only necessary paths
ServiceMonitor targets the correct port and path for metrics
verification: Verify all YAML files have valid syntax
Run pnpm turbo build to ensure no existing code was broken
findings: Had to add infra/helm/**/templates and infra/terraform to .prettierignore because Prettier cannot parse Go template YAML syntax. The lint-staged pre-commit hook runs prettier --write on *.yaml files.
